justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted 'Monday next week' as June 8th and 'around 3 PM' as a window from 2 PM to 5 PM, and accurately adjusted the search window based on subsequent user requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered alternative days when the requested day was fully booked, but did not proactively offer a wider range of times on the same day when the initial specific time was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made several check_availability calls for Monday and Tuesday, some of which could have been combined or avoided if a broader search was initiated earlier.
justifications.customer_experience: The agent maintained a polite and professional tone throughout the conversation, clearly communicating availability and offering alternatives without exposing any technical jargon.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well by offering alternative days and times when the initial requests were unavailable, maintaining context throughout the conversation.
